name: pii
description: Scans tool results through a local model + regex pre-filter and blocks the request if PII is detected

permissions.name: env.cache_get
permissions.description: Skip re-scanning tool results already cleared this session

permissions.name: env.host_call.torana_offload_completion
permissions.description: Send tool output to the local PII-detection model

permissions.name: env.block_request
permissions.description: Reject a request whose tool output contains PII
